Submission source: DXBTW-BW-MAA-ZZ-ZZ-XX-RG-DM-00007_TIDP(1).xlsx (TIDP records assessed up to 16 Jul 2026).
How to use. Click any package block (viewer or matrix) to cycle its status: Planned → In Progress → Under Review → Submitted. Export CSV saves your current state; edit in Excel and Import CSV to load it back. Ultra Luxury villas carry a Second Floor package (Foundation → Ground → First → Second → Roof). Clashes are loaded from the available Navisworks HTML reports. Issues and Model Health will update when their live registers are provided.
